prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent generation of a candidate simulation blueprint until the hierarchy, block readiness, interfaces, signal/parameter mappings, and rollout boundary are validated for the requested bounded use.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Required interfaces, signals, parameters, units, and mappings
Current readiness blockers and validation receipts

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against hierarchy or blocks are not ready
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the required hierarchy, component blocks, or physical interfaces are missing or unvalidated
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against interface or mapping inventory is incomplete
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: required signal, parameter, unit, or interface bindings are missing
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against rollout boundary is unclear
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the intended pointwise or stateful semantics and rollout limits are not explicit
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against generation proceeds despite a blocker
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: generation eligibility is asserted while a required readiness condition is blocked
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
